Event: Triumphant Adventure
Event Date: 30/03/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: M35
Victor's Triumph Mace

When attacking, has a 40% chance of stunning an enemy for 3 sec.
Once in a while, the unit casts deep freeze effect upon the nearest enemy unit for 4 sec., and steals 20% physical and magic armor from all enemy units that are frozen or under the deep freeze effect for 4 sec. For 4 sec., the frozen unit is unable to move or attack, and the cooldown of all their abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) is increased by 4 sec. When the deep freeze effect wears off, the target of the ability explodes and receives 800000 magic damage. Icicles fly out of them, hitting 2 nearest enemy units. On hit, the icicles deal 400000 magic damage, increase the cooldown of the targets' gear and artifact abilities by 4 sec., and cast stiffness on them. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 55% for 4 sec.

Once every 3 sec., the mace's wielder makes all enemy units afflicted with freezing or stiffness explode, dealing pure damage equal to 80% of the mace wielder's physical armor to these targets and all enemy units in a small radius around them.
This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.

Requirements: 98-100
